we are looking for an experienced data scientist to join our team if you have excellent programming skills and a passion for developing applications or improving existing ones we would like to meet you as a data scientist you ll work closely with our engineers to ensure system consistency and improve user experience data scientist roles and responsibilities include develop data science model using various machine learning platform such as cloudera data science workbench cdsw google ai azure ml imb watson aws sagemaker sas r python or others follow project timeline to ensure project complete on time and on budget develop new product in machine learning area such as demand forecasting product recommendation or basket analysis and other solution improve competencies in machine learning area pt metrodata electronics tbk digital solution provider technology innovator would like to invite you to be part of the company to develop yourself and your skills if you are bachelor s degree computer science information technology 2 3 years of experience in data modelling predictive modelling and in developing machine learning knows programming language e g r python scala passion in big data analytics a strong mix of mathematical statistical and programming skills solid analytical and problem solving skills to create data driven insights if you meet the requirement we needed let s apply for the following open positions metrodata not just offer for the job we offer you for brighter career future

as a data scientist you ll be part of a team that is working on cutting edge machine learning models you will work side by side with analysts and machine learning engineers and take full ownership of your work from the initial idea generation phase to the implementation of the final product our ideal candidate is result focused innovative has a solid quantitative background and a good business understanding about the role working in a multi disciplined team where you ll take full ownership of turning discoveries and ideas into machine learning models prototyping diverse machine learning models from credit scoring to recommendation engine researching development on how to improve our models by using our vast amount and unique set of data actively contribute to taking data science at kredivo group to the next level about you minimum 2 years of relevant work experience graduated from the major of or equivalent experience in a quantitative field i e computer science mathematics statistics econometrics engineering artificial intelligence capable to build robust end to end predictive models using the latest machine learning techniques and methodologies proficiency in python or r exposure to rdbms i e mysql postgresql and no sql platforms i e s3 excellent english communication skills bonus points optional for experience with alternate data to evaluate credit risk experience in building end to end deep learning and or nlp models thank you for your interest in kredivo we re thrilled that you d like to join our company unfortunately days are short and applicants are many so we won t have time to meet everyone if you are among qualified candidates you will receive a call or email from our talent acquisition team li al1

data scientist bertugas untuk melakukan pengembangan permodelan machine learning atau artificial intelligent yang diperlukan untuk menjawab permasalah yang ingin dipecahkan client penempatan wfo di jakarta persyaratan berpengalaman dalam pekerjaan terkait data scientist minimal 2 tahun pernah terlibat dalam beberapa use case data science pernah menggunakan library langchain llamaindex dan pernah menggunakan microsoft specific azure openai llm dan azure ai search search index vector database mempunyai sertifikasi professional data scientist seperti cdsm cdsp advance dalam bahasa pemrograman python pyspark untuk pemodelan machine learning advance dalam sql advance dalam teknik pemodelan machine learning artificial intelligent dan statistik i e classification regression clustering fraud detection credit scoring advance dalam menggunakan tableau google analytics tools dashboard lainnya pengalaman dalam teknologi big data spark hive impala lebih diutamakan memiliki sertifikasi atau training data science dari lembaga resmi

key responsibilities design develop and deploy machine learning models to solve business problems and optimize processes create dynamic dashboards and visualizations using power bi and other bi tools to communicate insights effectively integrate and analyze data from multiple sources internal and external to ensure comprehensive reporting collaborate with cross functional teams and third party vendors to deliver project objectives work closely with the sales director to develop dashboards and reports that support sales operations present findings and recommendations to stakeholders in a clear concise manner ensure data integrity security and compliance with company standards required skills competencies technical expertise strong knowledge of sql database languages and data modeling proficiency in power bi python r and machine learning frameworks familiarity with agentic ai concepts and applications analytical skills ability to interpret complex datasets and generate actionable insights experience in predictive modeling and statistical analysis communication presentation excellent verbal and written communication skills ability to present technical findings to non technical stakeholders project management experience working on project based assignments with external partners qualifications bachelor s or master s degree in data science computer science statistics or related field minimum 5 years of experience in data science roles within fmcg companies proven track record of delivering machine learning driven dashboards and analytics placement pasar rebo east jakarta

job description 1 evaluasi performansi dampak bisnis ai a business understanding pemahaman ruang lingkup proses bisnis b data preparation melakukan pengumpulan data data quality assurance terkait performansi dampak bisnis ai c data processing modelling melakukan proses pengolahan data summarization modelling d presentation consulting membuat laporan memberikan rekomendasi presentasi 2 pembuatan konsep solusi analytics a discovery pemahaman proses bisnis identifikasi permasalahan b formulate membuat konsep solusi analytics mendefinisikan kebutuhan cost c presentation consulting membuat material komunikasi konsep solusi presentasi konsultasi terkait solusi analytics job requirement 1 minimal s1 jurusan data science statistics atau bidang terkait 2 minimal pengalaman 1 tahun di peran analisis problem solving 3 pemahaman proses bisnis kemampuan untuk formulasi kerangka untuk evaluasi performansi dampak bisnis 4 menguasai tools data sql for data management r or python data processing modelling data visualization tools power bi tablue bi tools 5 kemampuan komunikasi verbal visual termasuk kemampuan untuk mendeskripsikan konsep teknis yang kompleks kepadastakeholder non teknis skill requirement information security

kualifikasi minimum pendidikan minimal s1 di bidang akuntansi matematika ekonomi atau bidang terkait pengalaman 1 2 tahun sebagai data analyst atau memiliki pengalaman di bidang data analitik maupun operasional lebih disukai mampu berbahasa inggris dengan baik lisan dan tulisan mampu berbahasa mandarin menjadi nilai tambah lisan dan tulisan menguasai microsoft excel google sheets tingkat lanjut pivot table vlookup xlookup data model formula kompleks dll memiliki kemampuan melakukan data cleaning data transformation dan agregasi data secara efektif memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat detail oriented dan cepat tanggap dalam mengidentifikasi masalah mampu berpikir logis dan analitis serta mampu menemukan pola dari data memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menyajikan data secara jelas dan terstruktur memiliki pengalaman di industri printing packaging akan menjadi nilai tambah deskripsi pekerjaan melakukan proses data cleaning secara menyeluruh dan memastikan keakuratan dan konsistensi data yang digunakan dalam laporan maupun analisis menyusun dan menyajikan laporan kinerja operasional secara rutin baik harian mingguan maupun bulanan sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan menyusun dan membantu laporan lain yang dibutuhkan manajemen

responsibilities assist in collecting cleaning and organizing datasets perform data analysis and generate insights for projects and reporting create dashboards or visual reports using tools like excel google sheets or data visualization software support the team in decision making through data driven inputs conduct research and basic forecasting when required requirements final year student or recent graduate in statistics data science engineering computer science or related fields strong analytical and critical thinking skills familiar with data analysis tools excel google sheets bonus sql python tableau power bi detail oriented and loves working with numbers self motivated curious and eager to learn

data analyst kualifikasi 1 minimal s1 diutamakan jurusan statistika matematika ilmu kesehatan masyarakat teknik komputer atau jurusan yang berkecimpung dangan pengolahan data 2 memiliki pengalaman di bidang data analysis dan atau statistic menjadi nilai tambah 3 paham metode statistika dan visualisasi data 4 memiliki pengalaman dengan software statistic atau analisis data seperti spss excel r python tableau atau yang lain lain 5 memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk mempresentasikan temuan data dengan jelas dan efektif kepada non technical stakeholders 6 memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik untuk mengidentifikasi masalah yang berkaitan dengan data 7 detail dan teliti untuk memastikan keakuratan pada data yang dianalisa deskripsi pekerjaan 1 mengolah data dan memvisualkan data terutama dibidang kesehatan dan manajemen rumah sakit dan klinik 2 melakukan proses data cleaning secara menyeluruh dan memastikan keakuratan dan konsistensi data yang digunakan dalam laporan maupun analisis 3 menyusun dan membantu laporan lain yang dibutuhkan manajemen marketing pengadaan dsb 4 melakukan analisis forecast dan menyajikan insight yang relevan untuk mendukung efektivitas pemasaran dan strategi bisnis rumah sakit dan klinik 5 mendukung tim kolaborasi dengan departemen lain untuk pertimbangan pengambilan keputusan berdasarkan data

kualifikasi minimum pendidikan minimal s1 di bidang statistika matematika ekonomi teknologi informasi atau bidang terkait pengalaman minimal 1 2 tahun sebagai data analyst atau memiliki pengalaman di bidang data analitik maupun operasional mampu berbahasa inggris dengan baik lisan dan tulisan menguasai microsoft excel google sheets tingkat lanjut pivot table vlookup xlookup data model formula kompleks dll memiliki kemampuan melakukan data cleaning data transformation dan agregasi data secara efektif memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat detail oriented dan cepat tanggap dalam mengidentifikasi masalah mampu berpikir logis dan analitis serta mampu menemukan pola dari data memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menyajikan data secara jelas dan terstruktur memiliki kemampuan analisis forecast peramalan menjadi nilai tambah memiliki pengalaman di industri f b retail atau fmcg akan menjadi nilai tambah deskripsi pekerjaan melakukan proses data cleaning secara menyeluruh dan memastikan keakuratan dan konsistensi data yang digunakan dalam laporan maupun analisis menyusun dan menyajikan laporan kinerja operasional secara rutin baik harian mingguan maupun bulanan sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan menyusun dan membantu laporan lain yang dibutuhkan manajemen sales distribusi dan stok melakukan proses pengumpulan dan verifikasi struktur data distributor dengan memastikan setiap data yang diterima telah disesuaikan dengan format standar yang telah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan menganalisis tren penjualan pola permintaan musiman serta konstribusi tiap produk dan wilayah melakukan analisis forecast dan menyajikan insight yang relevan untuk mendukung efektivitas pemasaran dan strategi distribusi mendukung tim sales marketing dengan data analitik untuk pengambilan keputusan

qualifications bachelor s or master s degree in computer science data science statistics mathematics or other quantitative fields minimum 5 years of applied data science or ai experience with a proven track record of delivering measurable business impact experience in f b retail or fast paced startup environments plus strong python skills including experience with libraries such as scikit learn tensorflow pytorch xgboost and frameworks like langchain or openai api plus proven experience in deploying machine learning models using ml platforms e g mlflow vertex ai azure ml or similar strong understanding of statistics experiment design a b testing and regression methods ability to translate complex models and insights into clear business recommendations familiarity with dbt airflow or other data pipeline orchestration tools plus interest or hands on exposure to llms generative ai or applied ai development plus strong problem solving skills analytical mindset and attention to detail excellent communication and stakeholder management skills able to collaborate with business product and engineering teams hands on leadership style able to mentor analysts scientists and elevate team capabilities proactive collaborative and drives ai literacy and responsible ai adoption across the organization placement hybrid jakarta malang

key responsibilities collect clean and analyze data from various sources build and maintain reports and dashboards to track business performance perform data validation and integrity checks across systems translate business questions into analytical problems and provide actionable insights collaborate with cross functional teams to understand data requirements and deliver solutions support data driven decision making processes across departments must have qualifications advanced skills in excel and google sheets including formulas such as index match importrange and query intermediate proficiency in python especially in data analysis libraries like pandas numpy matplotlib and seaborn basic sql query skills for working with relational databases strong logical and critical thinking skills with the ability to solve complex problems efficiently attention to detail and a proactive attitude toward data quality and accuracy preferred qualifications nice to have experience with bi tools e g google data studio power bi looker understanding of statistical analysis or forecasting methods exposure to cloud based platforms like google cloud platform or aws

column2: Data Analytics & Machine Learning Consultant - Entry Level
column5: we only hire the best join our elite consulting team english fluency is a must to work with global clients and experts datapower is a leading fintech consulting company specializing in personal digital lending credit risk modeling fraud detection and ai driven operational marketing we empower banks multi finance companies and other financial institutions in southeast asia and africa with innovative ai driven solutions as we expand our presence in indonesia we are looking for high potential consultants with strong capabilities in data analytics statistics and machine learning to join our expert team what you ll do work on data driven fintech consulting projects across credit risk fraud detection and marketing analytics build analyze and optimize machine learning models for client specific use cases extract insights from financial behavioral and alternative data sources e g slik app data transactions support client implementation and documentation of analytical models collaborate with data scientists business analysts and industry experts across project phases who we re looking for we are seeking top tier university graduates with outstanding academic performance gpa 3 5 4 0 majors computer science statistics mathematics data science financial engineering technical skills solid understanding of machine learning and statistical algorithms proficient in python and sql familiarity with model evaluation feature engineering and data visualization mindset analytical thinker proactive problem solver and collaborative team playerpreferred qualifications internship or work experience in data science or analytics roles exposure to financial services fintech or credit scoring projects experience with cloud platforms e g gcp aws is a plus if you re ready to accelerate your career work with global experts and create real impact for banks and fintechs across southeast asia and africa apply now and be part of our journey

pt central mega kencana is seeking a skilled and detail oriented data analyst to join our team at cmk studio east jakarta the ideal candidate has strong analytical skills and is experienced in transforming data into meaningful insights to support business decision making key responsibilities collect process and analyze large sets of data from various sources develop dashboards and visual reports using power bi and tableau provide data driven insights and recommendations to support business strategies collaborate with cross functional teams to understand data needs and reporting requirements ensure accuracy consistency and integrity of data across all reports requirements bachelor s degree s1 minimum preferably in statistics mathematics computer science information systems or related fields proven experience as a data analyst or similar analytical role strong proficiency in power bi and tableau mandatory solid understanding of data processing visualization and analytical methods strong attention to detail problem solving skills and the ability to communicate insights clearly can work immediately must have a clean bi checking record

job description prepare a customer satisfaction survey with the appropriate method ensuring the achievement of customer satisfaction scores above the targets set ensuring the quality of internal surveys and conducting analysis execute and evaluate action plans and campaigns to increase customer satisfaction requirements bachelor master s degree in statistics mathematics management or it with a minimum gpa of 3 00 from a reputable university have a minimum of 2 years experience in data analysis customer satisfaction customer survey skills fluent in english verbal written microsoft office minimal intermediate planning and organizing skills customer service oriented looking for character development timeline planning work with cross function team strong analytical and logical thinking good interpersonal communication able to work as a team or independent

responsibilities providing data analytics for the lending portfolio to support decision making on the lending business providing data source for operational needs that can be consumed by various team credit underwriting risk collection business team supporting with data tracking of the system app website used in lending business to optimize the business process support business units in providing business intelligence dashboard through tableau power bi or other performance dashboard tool to manage any data acquisition data integration through etl elt process to support data ingestion and transformation requirements at least a bachelor s defree in statistics mathematics computer science computing economics or finance minimum 3 years experience as data analyst preferably in lending company multifinance bank or fintech experience and deep understanding of sql r python programming or other programming language experience with data visualization tools e g tableau power bi looker qliksense will be an advantage hardworking and able to work under tight dateline pressure in fast pace company environment

about the role become a key member of the technology team at pt lotte innovate indonesia as a full time machine learning engineer in this role you will be responsible for developing and implementing advanced machine learning models and algorithms to drive innovation and solve complex business challenges the position is based in cilegon banten what you ll be doing design and develop machine learning models and algorithms to tackle a variety of business problems collaborate with cross functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions implement and optimise machine learning models ensuring they are accurate efficient and scalable analyse and interpret complex data sets to extract meaningful insights stay up to date with the latest advancements in machine learning and apply innovative techniques to drive continuous improvement document and communicate your work to technical and non technical stakeholders mentor and guide junior team members in machine learning best practices what we re looking for degree in computer science artificial intelligence machine learning or a related technical field 5 years of experience in developing and deploying machine learning models in a production environment proficiency in programming languages such as python tensorflow pytorch or keras strong understanding of machine learning algorithms data preprocessing model selection and evaluation experience in deploying and maintaining machine learning models in cloud environments excellent problem solving and analytical skills with a keen eye for detail strong communication skills to effectively collaborate with cross functional teams

responsibilities collect manage and analyze large datasets related to store performance and operational efficiency support ongoing business and improvement projects by providing data insights reports and dashboards collaborate with cross functional teams operations merchandising and finance to ensure accuracy and consistency of business data assist in identifying trends issues and opportunities based on data analysis to support decision making develop and improve data tracking systems or templates to increase reporting efficiency requirements bachelor s degree in business statistics industrial engineering or a related field 1 2 years of experience in data analysis business operations or project support strong analytical and numerical skills with attention to detail proficient in microsoft excel and familiar with data visualization tools comfortable handling large datasets and transforming them into actionable insights

job description oversee the collection integration and management of data across multiple sales channels develop and maintain data pipelines to ensure data reliability and analytical readiness perform systematic data cleansing transformation and validation activities conduct comprehensive analyses related to sales performance market behavior and campaign effectiveness implement predictive modeling and advanced statistical methods to support business planning create impactful dashboards charts and reports for strategic decision making provide strategic recommendations derived from data driven insights coordinate with cross departmental teams to support analytical requirements ensure data governance quality control and consistency of analytical processes evaluate and enhance internal processes based on analytical findings qualifications bachelor s degree in informatics engineering computer science mathematics statistics or equivalent minimum 2 years of relevant experience as a data analyst previous experience in the beauty personal care industry is advantageous advanced proficiency in analytical programming tools python sql r familiarity with business intelligence platforms such as power bi or tableau exceptional attention to detail with strong problem solving skills ability to collaborate effectively within a cross functional environment strong presentation and communication abilities

job description business partners and analytics driven specialist for identifying incremental business revenue and volume potential through quantitative methodology by developing actionable insights identification of business opportunities formulating various business insights through the use of analytics driven methodology and scoring method to identify business opportunities and improve business performances complete preparation of business insights framework from opportunities gathering data sizing business presentation and revenue volume impact analysis prepare strategic recommendations and solution to answer business problems proactively collaborate with product and sales team to apply customer insights generate smart leads to respective business units for cross sell up sell activities develop propensity modeling for generating smart leads with higher probability to improve sales productivity and customer s experience qualifications work experience bachelor s master degree in economics finance or statistics mathematics min gpa 3 00

as a valued member of our it team you ll play a crucial role in ensuring the excellence of our quality systems daily you ll also have exciting opportunities to drive innovation and enhance our manufacturing processes through continuous improvement initiatives qualifications minimal bachelor degree in information system computer science statistics or related field have min 2 years of experience in involve project data analysis database management proficiency in sql server python and or r experience with data visualization tableau power bi etc familiar with statistical methods have good analytical thinking communication and collaboration fluent in english both oral and written

job description data analysis and interpretation utilize tools like google data studio bigquery and power bi to analyze marketing data and extract meaningful insights developing reporting dashboards create dynamic dashboards and reports that provide real time insights into sales marketing product performance collaborating with sales and marketing teams work closely with other teams to understand their data needs and provide insights that inform strategy and decision making data integration and management integrate data from various sources to provide a comprehensive view of products services campaigns company performance performance tracking monitor key performance indicators kpis to measure the effectiveness of campaigns activities and strategies monitoring and alerts set up a data driven system to alert positive and negative deviations for key parameters predictive analysis use data to predict trends and market movements aiding in proactive strategy development training and support provide training and support to team members in using data analysis tools and understanding reports be an independently working professional with a creative mind and drive for results and success minimum qualifications bachelor s or master s degree in computer science information technology data science software engineering or a related field strong foundation in mathematics statistics and data structures data analysis expert with experience in data programming languages and visualization software excel gsheet sql tableau metabase python etc advanced excel modeling and data visualization skills very strong analytical and problem solving mindset data warehouses snowflake bigquery amazon redshift

about us at pt pro teknologi siber we re at the cutting edge of ai innovation our mission is to drive transformative solutions using the power of artificial intelligence to shape the future of computer vision we believe in fostering a culture of collaboration learning and personal growth our team thrives on challenging projects that make a real world impact and we re excited to expand our ai capabilities with driven passionate individuals like you role overview we are looking for a junior ai engineer to join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of ai models including computer vision applications in this role you ll assist in designing implementing and optimizing ai systems using machine learning and deep learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks cnns and object detection frameworks you ll play a key role in data preprocessing ensuring data quality and integrity while also supporting the testing and validation of computer vision models you will collaborate closely with senior engineers to learn and grow in this rapidly evolving field what you ll do develop ai computer vision models assist in the creation and refinement of machine learning and deep learning models including computer vision applications like image classification object detection and image segmentation using frameworks such as tensorflow keras and pytorch code implementation write clean efficient and scalable code in python java or scala to implement ai algorithms particularly for computer vision tasks data management support the team in managing cleaning
